leadText: Dire Claw (Japanese: フェイタルクロー Fatal Claw) is a damage-dealing Poison-type move introduced during Generation VIII, in Pokémon Legends: Arceus. It is the signature move of Sneasler.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Dire Claw inflicts damage and has an increased critical-hit ratio. It has a 50% chance (80% chance in the strong style ) to either poison the target, paralyze it, or make it drowsy . Pokémon Legends: Arceus Category Physical PP 15 Agile Strong Power 60 45 75 Accuracy 100% 100% 100% Action speed modifier Self 0 0 +5 Target 0 +3 0 Additional effect Chance 50% 50% 80% Turns 3 2 4 Crit. Stage +1 +1 +2 May inflict the target with poison, paralysis, or drowsiness Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Dire Claw's power has been changed from 60 to 80. It has a 50% chance of leaving the target poisoned, paralyzed, or asleep (approximately a 16.67% chance for each status individually), and does not have an increased critical-hit ratio.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description LA The user lashes out at the target with ruinous claws, aiming to land a critical hit. This may also leave the target poisoned, paralyzed, or drowsy. S V The user lashes out at the target with ruinous claws, aiming to land a critical hit. This may also leave the target poisoned, paralyzed, or asleep. * The user lashes out at the target with ruinous claws. This may also leave the target poisoned, paralyzed, or asleep. *

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Dire Claw is the only Poison-type move that can inflict paralysis or sleep .
